name: St Marys School Bus Lines Inc
notes: PA business entity confirmed: ST. MARYS SCHOOL BUS LINES, INC., domestic business corporation, registration number 315521 (pacompanies internal ID 31443871), address Trout Run Rd, St. Marys, PA 15857, status Active. No SAFER/FMCSA carrier record found under this name or close variants (ST MARYS SCHOOL, ST MARYS BUS, ST MARYS) - returned 0 hits in SAFER keyword search; only unrelated 'Saint Marys School' in Raleigh NC appeared. This is consistent with an intrastate school-bus contractor that may operate solely under PA PUC/PennDOT authority and not require an FMCSA USDOT registration. Incorporation/registration date not visible on the pacompanies.org public listing.

Fleet very small (1 unit / 1 driver per FMCSA).

Note: input list says 'Flushing, NY' but the actual operating address is Jackson Heights 11372 (same ZIP, adjacent Queens neighborhoods - the ZIP 11372 covers Jackson Heights, not Flushing proper). Hub.biz lists founded 1992 (one year before NY DOS filing - possibly DBA before incorporation). No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'COKY TRANSPORTATION' or 'COKY' (0 hits) - consistent with intrastate-only school bus operator regulated by NY DOT/NYC DOE rather than FMCSA. Statement Status was 'Past Due' as of 10/31/2019 per NY DOS but entity still listed Active.
